title: Customs Import Documents Automation with AI Processing
metaTitle: Customs Import Documents Automation | AI Processing Tool
metaDescription: Automate customs declarations, commercial invoices, and shipping manifests processing. Convert import documents to Excel with AI extraction.

hero.headline: Automate Customs Import Documents Processing with AI
hero.subheadline: Convert customs declarations, commercial invoices, and shipping manifests from PDF to structured Excel spreadsheets in minutes

summary: Import/export businesses process hundreds of customs documents monthly, manually extracting data from declarations, invoices, and manifests. This AI-powered solution converts these PDFs and scanned documents into structured Excel spreadsheets, extracting key fields like HS codes, values, weights, and shipper details automatically.
whenThisIsRelevant: Processing customs declarations for duty calculations
Extracting commercial invoice data for compliance reporting
Converting shipping manifests for inventory management
supportedInputs: Customs declaration PDFs from government portals
expectedOutputs: Excel spreadsheets with extracted customs data fields
CSV files containing invoice line items and values
commonChallenges: Manual data entry from hundreds of customs forms monthly
Extracting HS codes and duty rates from declaration PDFs
Converting supplier invoices with foreign languages or formats
Processing shipping manifests with inconsistent layouts
howItWorksSteps: Upload customs PDFs, invoices, or manifest images to the platform
AI identifies and extracts key fields like HS codes, values, weights, and shipper details
Review extracted data and customize fields for specific document formats
Download structured Excel files with one row per shipment or line item
whyPdfExcelAiFits: Handles both digital PDFs and scanned customs documents with OCR
Extracts complex customs fields like HS codes and duty classifications
Processes multiple document types in batch for efficiency
Provides 99%+ accuracy on clear government forms and standard invoices
limitations: Accuracy depends on document quality - faded scans may require manual review
Handwritten customs notes have limited recognition compared to printed text
Complex multi-page manifests with nested tables may need verification

faq.question: Can this process customs declarations from different countries?
faq.answer: Yes, it works with digital PDFs and scanned customs forms from various countries, though accuracy is highest with standard government formats and clear document quality.

faq.question: How does it handle commercial invoices in foreign languages?
faq.answer: The AI can extract numerical data and common fields from invoices in various languages, but field names may need customization for non-English documents.

faq.question: What customs data fields can be automatically extracted?
faq.answer: Common fields include HS codes, commodity descriptions, quantities, unit values, total values, country of origin, shipper details, and consignee information.

faq.question: Is there a limit on how many documents I can process?
faq.answer: No set limits - it uses pay-as-you-go pricing so you can process as many customs documents as needed, with batch processing for efficiency.

trustSignals: Files are encrypted and automatically deleted after processing
99%+ accuracy rate on clear government forms
OCR technology handles scanned customs documents
Free tier available to test with your documents
exampleUseCases: Import company processes 200 customs declarations monthly into compliance spreadsheet
Customs broker extracts duty rates and HS codes from client shipment PDFs
Freight forwarder converts shipping manifests to track container contents
Trade compliance team analyzes commercial invoice data for audit preparation
